subcodes.first_line: My spirit be a sacrifice for your love and a ransom for your service! After perusing your letter which was, in truth, the dawning-place of joy and the source of delight before the Throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی لحبکم الفداء و لخدمتکم الفدآء بعد از زیارت کتاب آنحضرت که فی الحقیقه مطلع سرور و مشرق ابتهاج بود لدی العرش
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @status of kings; future of monarchy, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
